examples: Sratching his head, Liubei answered, They said I am a clodhopper.
You're right. You look like a real clodhopper! You better just avoid dancing all together.
The man was a big, broad-shouldered, stupid-looking clodhopper of about twenty-three years of age.
Her standard outfit is a jacket with baggy trousers or calf-length skirt and flat-heeled, clodhopper shoes.
He tried to look the Robin Hood part by handing over some cash to a few clodhopper bank customers.
